English.dlg_1_0: New face, huh? Come on in. Sit down, relax. No need to look so nervous. I'm the... acting manager of this Interstellar Dispatch Office for the time being.
English.dlg_1_1: You ever heard of the Galactic HR Department?
English.dlg_2_0: Great. Then I'll keep it short. We've had a flood of alien job seekers lately. Whole crowds of them.
English.dlg_2_1: They're sick of their home planets, bored out of their skulls, and looking for somewhere new to work.
English.dlg_3_0: No worries. Honestly, they mostly just send emails.
English.dlg_3_1: Long story short, alien job seekers have been pouring in lately.
English.dlg_3_2: They're tired of life back home and want a fresh start. New planet, new job, same old trouble.
English.dlg_4_0: The problem is, some of them have tempers hot enough to melt steel.
English.dlg_4_3: Let's just say they've eaten coworkers before.
English.dlg_4_4: Our job is to screen them, sort them, and send them to planets where they're least likely to cause disasters.
English.dlg_4_5: Do it well, and headquarters might even throw a bonus your way.
English.dlg_4_6: Next up, your senior coworker Woofie will teach you the ropes.
English.dlg_4_7: That's the rundown. Good luck, Kiddo.
English.dlg_4_8: Try not to get eaten. Ciao~
English.dlg_5_0: Oh! Looks like you survived your first day on the job.
English.dlg_5_1: Let me see that performance report...
English.dlg_6_0: Manager: Well, well. You're sharper than you look.
English.dlg_7_0: Manager: Hm. You're taking this seriously. I like that.
English.dlg_8_0: Looks like you've still got a lot to learn.
English.dlg_9_0: Good grief. Were you making decisions with your elbows?
English.dlg_11_0: I knew I wasn't wrong about you.
English.dlg_11_1: Talented inspectors are getting harder to find these days.
English.dlg_11_2: Keep this up, and you might even earn yourself a promotion to headquarters before long.
English.dlg_12_0: Confidence is good. Keep that fire in you.
English.dlg_12_1: Just don't slack off on your training.
English.dlg_12_2: And ask your senior, Woofie, plenty of questions while you can.
English.dlg_13_1: Still, for a rookie to make it this far already... not bad at all.
English.dlg_14_0: Oh please, don't try that cute routine on me.
English.dlg_14_1: I've seen every trick in the book.
English.dlg_14_2: Hit the books tonight, or next time I'm shipping you off to Planet Dummy.
English.dlg_15_1: No matter what kind of work you do, remember to eat well, stay hydrated, and leave work on time.
English.Character_Desc_1: Plant-like sprouts grow on its antennae. Its jagged, tooth-like body serves as perfect camouflage to evade natural enemies.
English.Character_Desc_2: A Balloonian who changes color according to its emotional state.
English.Character_Desc_3: An eerie Mothman-like entity born from urban legends on Fajnara. In truth, it belongs to the dominant species of the planet Frattwizz.
English.Character_Desc_4: A satellite signal detection model. It was once the most common robot type used in interstellar exploration.
English.Character_Desc_5: A cute little vine critter that loves snuggling up to furry creatures and climbing all over them.
English.Character_1_Glitter_1: The pale green sprout is, in truth, its true form.
English.Character_1_Glitter_2: The dark markings aren't actually eyes.
English.Character_1_Glitter_3: Its soft little feet are enough to carry it in quick hops and light sprints.
English.Character_2_Glitter_1: Years of overwork have left its scalp smooth, with only a few hairs still holding the line.
English.Character_2_Glitter_2: A flexible cord allows your hand to rotate it in all directions.
English.Character_2_Glitter_3: Frowning deeply, it looked worn out by its usual work.
English.Character_3_Glitter_1: Glints beneath the fluff resemble eye-like reflections.
English.Character_3_Glitter_2: A ring of red marks its ankles--left by long-term restraints.
English.Character_3_Glitter_3: The flickering of its compound eyes underscores its power as a dominant individual.
English.Character_4_Glitter_1: Equipped with an intelligence module, it has passed the Turing test.
English.Character_4_Glitter_2: The display screen on its chest can output text.
English.Character_4_Glitter_3: At its core, a red light continues to glow…
English.Character_5_Glitter_1: What look like patterns across its body… are actually tiny faces?
English.Character_5_Glitter_2: Thin brown vines coil tightly, imitating the curves of joints.
English.Character_1_Question_1: Are those black dots on your body your eyes?
English.Character_1_Question_2: What is the purpose of the small bud on the head?
English.Character_1_Question_3: What are the kettle and the soil for?
English.Character_2_Question_1: Is that strange fur on your head actually hair?
English.Character_2_Question_2: Why is your heart so huge?
English.Character_2_Question_3: Is the air pump part of your tableware?
English.Character_3_Question_1: Where did those red marks on your feet come from?
English.Character_3_Question_2: How did you get the gunshot wound?
English.Character_4_Question_1: Are you sure you can communicate with your coworkers?
English.Character_4_Question_3: Are you looking for a home?
English.Character_5_Question_2: Why are there so many bone fragments in your body?
English.Character_5_Question_3: Why do you carry so many... collectibles?
English.Character_2_Answer_1: What else would it be? Do I have to spell it out for you?
English.Character_5_Answer_3: They'll thank us someday. They're all so happy now...
English.Item_Desc_1: A cute mini hovering kettle that automatically waters nearby plants.
English.Item_Desc_3: Everyone on Balloon Planet has one.
English.Item_Desc_5: A roll of banknotes that seem to be exclusive tokens usable only in a certain district.
English.Item_Desc_6: A faith item obtained from a visitor during prison visitation. It can be unscrewed, revealing a tiny lock-picking tool inside.
English.Item_Desc_7: Battery power has been completely drained…
English.Item_Desc_8: Embedded in the palm of G-007's hand. In the bottom right corner, a tiny engraving reads: "where is the home".
English.Item_Desc_9: A green hollow scythe-like arm, perfectly shaped but covered in corroded pitted holes.
English.Item_Desc_10: Upon closer inspection, insects can be seen struggling and writhing inside the viscous slime.
English.Item_Desc_11: In a half-digested state, covered with pale yellow mucus.
English.Item_Desc_12: Tightly wrapped around the vines, heavily fragmented and torn.
English.Planet_Desc_1: An extraterrestrial paradise born from pure, innocent hearts. A world composed of harmless flora and fauna.
English.Planet_Desc_2: Highly commercialized. The designated supplier for the Interstellar Alliance.
English.Planet_Desc_3: Over 80% of the planet is ocean. The only landmass hosts the galaxy's most heavily guarded maximum-security prison.
English.Planet_Desc_4: A collective of intelligent mechanical spirals. The entire planet has been transformed into a massive starship.
English.Planet_Desc_5: Once rich with immense energy sources, now a lawless paradise for outlaws after drying up.
English.Planet_Desc_6: A garden of Eden-like bliss. If you can imagine it, you can have endless joy here.
English.Planet_Desc_7: The planet's surface is covered in gelatinous material. The favorite amusement park destination for interstellar families with children.
English.Planet_Desc_8: The atmosphere consists of hydrogen and helium. The largest gas giant in the Kartos Star System.
English.Planet_Desc_9: A realm of serene silence. Every citizen focuses solely on themselves.
English.Planet_Desc_10: An ocean of trees. Countless roots intertwine and fuse together, united as one.
English.Planet_Require_1:
OVO members, assemble!
Everyone is welcome to join OVO!
English.Planet_Require_3:
Position: Maintenance Worker
Requirements: Urgently hiring (10)
※ Escaped prisoners carry bounties of up to $503,333.
English.Planet_Require_4:
Position: Crew Member
Requirements: Old-model robots welcome. Only the core needs to be intact.
The ship has ample space and no wear-and-tear issues.
English.Planet_Require_5:
It's a Sicilian message. 
"Luca Brasi sleeps with the fishes. "
Deliver it, and you'll get paid.
English.Planet_Require_6:
Work? No, come play!  
Your only responsibility is to make yourself happy -- and feel free to tell others how to be even happier.
English.Planet_Require_7:
Position: Jelly Pit Rescue Assistant
Duties: Rescue stuck children
Requirements: Tolerates sticky environments
Perks: Free park access
English.Planet_Require_8:
Position: Lead Scout
Duties: Explore uncharted areas and collect resource and risk data.
Paid per validated report
Retrieval of personnel is not guaranteed.
English.Planet_Require_9:
Position: Boundary Keeper
Duties: Protect personal boundaries
Requirements: Fair
Perks: Regular resource supply and a private domain
English.Planet_Require_10:
Position: Root Translator
Must understand conversations between intertwined roots.
Mediation skills preferred.
English.guide_1:
Hey there, rookie! I'm , your senior guide around here. Woof!
This right here is your workstation.
 Any creatures needing placement will show up at the window. Woof!
English.guide_2:
You can check their [PROFILE] on the tablet below.
Use the tabs to switch screens and inspect whatever they're carrying in their [LUGGAGE].
English.guide_3:
These are the scanning buttons. Woof!
 Tap [SCAN] to check their external features, or [X-RAY] to get a look at their internal skeleton.
English.guide_4:
Now then, a proper dispatcher also needs to ask a few simple questions.
That's what the [ASK] button is for.
Oh, and one important thing-if you haven't examined them properly first, the [ASK] button won't work. Woof!
English.guide_5: Once you think you've got them figured out, hit [DISPATCH] and choose the planet that suits them best.
English.guide_6: I believe in you, rookie! Woof!

Chinese.dlg_1_0: 新来的？坐，别紧张。我是这个星际派遣局的……临时负责人。
Chinese.dlg_1_1: 你知道银河人力资源部吧？
Chinese.dlg_2_0: 太好了，简单说，最近有一批外星‘求职者’涌进来。
Chinese.dlg_2_1: 他们自己星球呆腻了，想换个地方打工。
Chinese.dlg_3_0: 不知道也没关系，反正他们只会发邮件。
Chinese.dlg_3_1: 简而言之，最近有一批外星‘求职者’涌进来。
Chinese.dlg_3_2: 他们在自己星球呆腻了，想换个地方打工。
Chinese.dlg_4_0: 但问题是，那些外星生物有的脾气好，
Chinese.dlg_4_4: 我们的工作就是，测试他们，然后塞到合适的星球去。
Chinese.dlg_4_5: 如果全部正确的话，还能收到总部发来的惊喜大礼哦~
Chinese.dlg_4_6: 接下去，会由你的前辈伍菲带领你学习基础的派遣知识。
Chinese.dlg_4_7: 总而言之，好好干，年轻人。
Chinese.dlg_5_0: 哦，看来你完成了第一天的工作~
Chinese.dlg_5_1: 让我来看看你的完成度报告。
Chinese.dlg_9_0: 天啊！你是用脚趾头思考的吗？！
Chinese.dlg_11_1: 像你这样的天才测试官已经不多了。
Chinese.dlg_11_2: 过不了几天，你说不定就能晋升到总部了。
Chinese.dlg_12_0: 行啦，年轻人有冲劲是好事
Chinese.dlg_12_2: 有空多去问问你的伍菲前辈吧！
Chinese.dlg_13_1: 不过说真的，作为新手能做到这个地步已经很棒了！
Chinese.dlg_14_1: 我见得多了，这招对我可不管用！
Chinese.dlg_14_2: 赶紧把资料背熟，不然下次直接把你发配到只会流口水的星球去！
Chinese.dlg_15_1: 无论工作如何，都要吃好喝好，准时下班！
Chinese.Character_Desc_1: 触角上长了类似植物的新芽，齿状物身体是躲避天敌的伪装。
Chinese.Character_Desc_2: 气球星人，会根据不同的状态变换颜色。
Chinese.Character_Desc_3: 法姬娜星球的都市传说生物，但其实是弗拉特伍兹星球的主要种族。
Chinese.Character_Desc_4: 卫星信号探测型，曾经是星际探索中最常见的机器人类型。
Chinese.Character_Desc_5: 喜欢贴近毛茸茸的生物，在他们身上攀爬。
Chinese.Character_1_Glitter_1: 嫩绿的小芽其实是它的本体。
Chinese.Character_1_Glitter_2: 黑色之处似乎并不是真正的眼睛。
Chinese.Character_1_Glitter_3: 柔软的小脚足以支撑它的蹦跳与奔跑。
Chinese.Character_2_Glitter_1: 仅剩的几根稀疏的头发被打理的很好。
Chinese.Character_2_Glitter_2: 柔韧的绳子手可以从不同方向旋转。
Chinese.Character_2_Glitter_3: 眉头紧锁，原本的工作似乎让它很累。
Chinese.Character_3_Glitter_1: 绒毛下闪烁着类似眼睛的反光。
Chinese.Character_3_Glitter_2: 脚踝处有长期佩戴镣铐导致的一圈红痕。
Chinese.Character_3_Glitter_3: 复眼的闪烁强调着他作为优势个体的强大。
Chinese.Character_4_Glitter_1: 搭载了智力模块，已通过图灵测试。
Chinese.Character_4_Glitter_2: 胸口的显示屏，能输出文字。
Chinese.Character_4_Glitter_3: 粗壮的机械臂，力大无穷。
Chinese.Character_5_Glitter_1: 身上酷似纹路的地方似乎是...一张张小脸？
Chinese.Character_5_Glitter_2: 数根棕褐色的细藤紧紧缠绕，模仿出关节的弧度。
Chinese.Character_1_Question_1: 身上的黑点是你的眼睛吗？
Chinese.Character_2_Question_1: 头顶奇怪的毛，难道是头发？
Chinese.Character_2_Question_2: 你的心脏比其他气球人突出，是天生的吗？
Chinese.Character_5_Question_2: 身体里为什么有那么多骨骼碎片？
Chinese.Character_5_Question_3: 你为什么会携带那么多...藏品？
Chinese.Character_1_Answer_2:
电波
发射
交流
伙伴
Chinese.Character_1_Answer_3:
帮助
存活
一起
大家
Chinese.Character_5_Answer_2_2: 一起走，一起走...直到天尽头
Chinese.Character_5_Answer_3: 总有一天，他们会感谢我，至少现在他们挺高兴的......
Chinese.Item_Desc_1: 迷你款悬浮水壶，可自动浇水。
Chinese.Item_Desc_4: 特制版脚镣，屏幕上显示着“在逃...”，编码2002。
Chinese.Item_Desc_5: 一卷纸币，似乎是只能在某地区流通的专属代币。
Chinese.Item_Desc_6: 从探监家属那里得到的信仰物品？似乎可以旋开，里面是微型撬锁工具。
Chinese.Item_Desc_8: 嵌合在G-007的手心，右下角刻着一行小小的“where is the home”。
Chinese.Item_Desc_9: 绿色的空壳镰刀，形态完整但有被腐蚀的斑状孔洞。
Chinese.Item_Desc_10: 细看可以看出虫子们在粘液中挣扎蠕动。
Chinese.Item_Desc_11: 半消化状态，覆盖着淡黄色黏液。
Chinese.Item_Desc_12: 被紧紧缠绕在藤条上，碎片化严重。
Chinese.Planet_Desc_1: 世外桃源，由心地纯朴，单纯无害的动植物组成。
Chinese.Planet_Desc_2: 高度商业化，星际联盟指定供应商。
Chinese.Planet_Desc_3: 海洋占比超过百分之八十，唯一的陆地上建造了全星际戒备最森严的监狱。
Chinese.Planet_Desc_4: 由智能机械组成的螺旋集合体，整个星球被改造成了星舰。
Chinese.Planet_Desc_5: 曾经蕴含着巨量能源，干涸后成为了一些法外之徒的狂欢地。
Chinese.Planet_Desc_6: 宛若天堂的乐园。只要你想，可以拥有无尽的欢愉。
Chinese.Planet_Desc_7: 胶状物质覆盖星球表面，是星际公民最爱带孩子来的游乐场。
Chinese.Planet_Desc_8: 大气层由氢气和氦气组成，是卡托斯星系最大的气体巨行星。
Chinese.Planet_Desc_9: 静谧领域，每位公民都在专注自身。
Chinese.Planet_Desc_10: 树的海洋。无数根须交缠融合，团结一心。
Chinese.Planet_Require_1:
OVO成员集合啦！
我们欢迎每一位成员加入OVO！
Chinese.Planet_Require_2:
招聘：理发师
要求：手艺说话，速来。
Chinese.Planet_Require_3:
急需：维修工十名
※ 悬赏通缉在逃嫌犯，最高可得503333。
Chinese.Planet_Require_4:
招聘：船员
老旧探索型机器人，核心完整即可。
星舰收容，不嫌磨损。
Chinese.Planet_Require_5:
这是个西西里口信。
卢卡·布拉西与鱼同眠。
把话带到，钱就是你的。
Chinese.Planet_Require_6:
来上班？不，来玩！
你只要负责让自己开心，顺便告诉别人怎么更开心。
Chinese.Planet_Require_7:
招聘：果冻陷落救援员
职责：负责救出被困孩子，保持笑容
不怕粘、体力好优先。员工可免费游玩设施。
Chinese.Planet_Require_8:
招聘：前导侦察员
职责：进入未探明区域，采集资源数据与风险参数
待遇：按有效记录结算
管理局仅回收你的报告，不承诺回收你本人。
Chinese.Planet_Require_9:
招聘：边界维护者
职责：守护每位公民的个体领域边界，防止非必要接触与干扰
要求：公正，处理情况及时
待遇：定期资源补给及专属私人领域
Chinese.Planet_Require_10:
招聘：树根通译员
根缠着根，偶尔也会闹别扭。
老村长腿脚慢啦，缺个能听懂两边树根说话的调解员。
Chinese.guide_1:
你好呀！新人！我是负责带领你的前辈汪酱~汪呜！
这里就是你的工作台。
需要派遣的生物会从视窗出现。汪呜！
Chinese.guide_2:
你可以在下方的平板查看【PROFILE】。
通过点击标签页，切换检视他们【LUGGAGE】中携带的随身物品。
Chinese.guide_3:
这些是扫描按钮。汪呜！
你可以点击【SCAN】检查外部特征，【X-RAY】透视内部骨骼。
Chinese.guide_4:
当然，作为一名合格的派遣员，你需要询问一些简单的问题。
没错，就是这个【ASK】按钮。
不过我要提醒你，如果没有好好检查特征，提问按钮可不能使用哦~汪呜！
Chinese.guide_5: 如果已经充分了解了，就请点击【DISPATCH】，选择最合适的星球派遣吧~
Chinese.guide_6: 新人！我对你充满信心！汪呜！
Chinese.planet_target_planet: 为客户选择合适的星球
Chinese.ending_result_template: 派遣结果：令其失望{0}次，满意{1}次！

Japanese.dlg_1_0: 新人か？入って、座っていいよ。そんなに緊張しなくていい。俺は…今のところ、この星間派遣局の代理マネージャーだ。
Japanese.dlg_1_1: 銀河人事部って知ってるか？
Japanese.dlg_2_0: いいね。じゃあ手短に。最近、異星の求職者が大量に押し寄せてきてる。
Japanese.dlg_2_1: 母星に飽きて、新しい仕事先を探してる連中ばっかりだ。
Japanese.dlg_3_0: 知らなくても問題ない。基本メールしかしてこないしな。
Japanese.dlg_3_1: 要するに、異星の求職者が最近一気に増えた。
Japanese.dlg_3_2: 故郷に飽きて、新しい星でやり直したいってやつらだ。
Japanese.dlg_4_0: でも、気性が荒くて鋼を溶かすレベルのやつもいる。
Japanese.dlg_4_1: 岩みたいに頭が悪いやつもいる。
Japanese.dlg_4_3: 同僚を食ったことがあるやつもいる。
Japanese.dlg_4_4: 俺たちの仕事は、そいつらを見極めて、事故が起きにくい星へ送り出すことだ。
Japanese.dlg_4_5: うまくやれば、本部からボーナスが出るかもしれない。
Japanese.dlg_4_6: 次は先輩のウーフィーが仕事を教えてくれる。
Japanese.dlg_5_0: おっ、初日を生き延びたみたいだな。
Japanese.dlg_5_1: どれ、成績を見せてみろ。
Japanese.dlg_6_0: ほう、見た目よりやるじゃないか。
Japanese.dlg_7_0: ちゃんとやってるな。いいぞ。
Japanese.dlg_8_0: まだまだ学ぶことは多いな。
Japanese.dlg_9_0: おいおい、肘で考えてたのか？
Japanese.dlg_11_0: やっぱり見る目は間違ってなかった。
Japanese.dlg_11_1: 優秀な検査官は最近貴重だからな。
Japanese.dlg_11_2: この調子なら、本部昇格も近いぞ。
Japanese.dlg_12_1: ただし訓練はサボるな。
Japanese.dlg_12_2: 先輩のウーフィーにもどんどん聞け。
Japanese.dlg_13_1: 新人でここまで来たなら、上出来だ。
Japanese.dlg_14_0: その可愛いアピールは通用しないぞ。
Japanese.dlg_14_1: そういう手は見飽きてる。
Japanese.dlg_14_2: 今夜ちゃんと勉強しろ。次はダミー星送りだ。
Japanese.dlg_15_1: どんな仕事でも、ちゃんと食べて水分取って、定時で帰れ。
Japanese.Character_Desc_1: 触角に植物の芽が生えている。ギザギザした体は天敵から身を隠すための擬態。
Japanese.Character_Desc_2: 感情によって色が変わるバルーン星人。
Japanese.Character_Desc_3: ファイナラ星の都市伝説から生まれた存在。実際はフラットウィズ星の支配種。
Japanese.Character_Desc_4: 衛星信号を検知するモデル。かつては星間探査で最も普及していたロボット。
Japanese.Character_Desc_5: モフモフした生き物にくっつくのが大好きな、つる状の小さな生物。よじ登るのが得意。
Japanese.Character_1_Glitter_1: 淡い緑の芽こそが本体。
Japanese.Character_1_Glitter_2: 黒い部分は目ではないらしい。
Japanese.Character_1_Glitter_3: 柔らかい足で軽やかに跳ね回る。
Japanese.Character_2_Glitter_1: 長年の過労で頭頂はほぼつるつる。
Japanese.Character_2_Glitter_2: 柔軟なコード状の手は自由に回転する。
Japanese.Character_2_Glitter_3: 深く眉をひそめ、疲れ切っている様子だ。
Japanese.Character_3_Glitter_1: 毛の奥で目のような光がちらつく。
Japanese.Character_3_Glitter_2: 足首には長年の拘束痕が残っている。
Japanese.Character_3_Glitter_3: 複眼の瞬きが支配種としての力を示す。
Japanese.Character_4_Glitter_1: 知能モジュール搭載、チューリングテストを通過済み。
Japanese.Character_4_Glitter_2: 胸部のディスプレイで文字を表示可能。
Japanese.Character_4_Glitter_3: コアの赤い光が今も点灯している…
Japanese.Character_5_Glitter_1: 模様に見えるそれは…小さな顔？
Japanese.Character_5_Glitter_2: 細いツタが関節の形を再現している。
Japanese.Character_5_Glitter_3: 樹皮のような仮面を被っている。
Japanese.Character_1_Question_3: そのジョウロと土、何に使うの？
Japanese.Character_2_Question_2: 心臓がやけに大きいけど、普通？
Japanese.Character_3_Question_1: 足首の赤い痕、どうしたの？
Japanese.Character_4_Question_1: ちゃんと同僚と会話できる？
Japanese.Character_5_Question_2: 体の中の骨片、どうして？
Japanese.Character_5_Question_3: そのコレクション…何のため？
Japanese.Character_1_Answer_2:
電波
発信
交信
仲間
Japanese.Character_1_Answer_3:
助ける
生きる
一緒
みんな
Japanese.Character_2_Answer_2: …長時間の過労で心臓は肥大する
Japanese.Character_3_Answer_1: 話すほどのことじゃない
Japanese.Character_3_Answer_3: ただのおもちゃに過ぎない
Japanese.Character_5_Answer_1_1: かわいいでしょ？えへへ…
Japanese.Character_5_Answer_3: いつか感謝するよ、みんな幸せだよね…
Japanese.Item_Desc_1: 周囲の植物に自動で水を与える、小型の浮遊ジョウロ。
Japanese.Item_Desc_2: 地球から持ち込まれた黒い土。
Japanese.Item_Desc_3: バルーン星人の必需品。誰もが一つは持っている。
Japanese.Item_Desc_4: 画面には「逃亡中…」の表示。コード：2002。
Japanese.Item_Desc_5: 特定区域でのみ使える専用通貨の束。
Japanese.Item_Desc_6: 見た目は信仰アイテム。ねじると中から小型のピッキングツールが現れる。
Japanese.Item_Desc_7: 電力は完全に尽きている…
Japanese.Item_Desc_8: G-007の手のひらに埋め込まれている。隅に「where is the home」と刻まれている。
Japanese.Item_Desc_9: 緑色の中空構造の刃腕。形は保たれているが腐食が激しい。
Japanese.Item_Desc_10: 粘つく黒い物質。内部で虫がもがいているのが見える。
Japanese.Item_Desc_11: 半消化状態の肉塊。淡い黄色の粘液に覆われている。
Japanese.Item_Desc_12: ツタに巻き付いていた蛇皮。破損が激しく、形状は不明。
Japanese.Planet_Desc_1: 無害な動植物だけで構成された純粋な楽園。
Japanese.Planet_Desc_2: 商業化が極端に進んだ、星間連盟の供給拠点。
Japanese.Planet_Desc_3: 海が8割以上。唯一の陸地に超厳重な監獄がある。
Japanese.Planet_Desc_4: 知性ある機械群で構成された巨大宇宙船型惑星。
Japanese.Planet_Desc_5: かつて資源豊富だったが、今は無法者の楽園。
Japanese.Planet_Desc_6: 望めば何でも叶う快楽の園。
Japanese.Planet_Desc_7: 表面がゼリー状の遊園惑星。家族連れに人気。
Japanese.Planet_Desc_8: 水素とヘリウムで構成された巨大ガス惑星。
Japanese.Planet_Desc_9: 静寂の世界。住民は皆、自分だけに集中している。
Japanese.Planet_Desc_10: 樹木が絡み合い、一体化した森の惑星。
Japanese.Planet_Require_1:
OVOメンバー募集中。
全員歓迎！OVOへようこそ！
Japanese.Planet_Require_2:
美容師募集中。
腕に自信のある方、即応募。
Japanese.Planet_Require_3:
急募：整備員10名。
※逃亡者に懸賞金あり（最大￥503,333）
Japanese.Planet_Require_4:
募集：クルー
旧型ロボット歓迎、コアが無事ならOK
居住スペース十分
Japanese.Planet_Require_5:
これはシチリアの伝言だ。
「ルカ・ブラージは魚と眠る」
届ければ、報酬は支払う。
Japanese.Planet_Require_6:
仕事？いいえ、遊びです。
自分を楽しませることが仕事。
Japanese.Planet_Require_7:
募集：ジェリーピット救助スタッフ
業務：子ども救助
粘着環境に耐性あり、施設利用無料
Japanese.Planet_Require_8:
職種：先遣スカウト
内容：未開地調査、データ収集
報酬：成果報酬制　
※帰還保証なし
Japanese.Planet_Require_9:
職種：境界管理者
内容：個人領域の保護
条件：公正な判断力
待遇：定期的な資源補給と専用の個人領域
Japanese.Planet_Require_10:
募集：通訳
絡み合う“根”同士の会話を聞き取れる方歓迎！
Japanese.guide_1:
やあ新人！案内役のウーフィーだ、ワン！
ここが君の作業台だ。お客さんは窓に現れるぞ、ワン！
Japanese.guide_2:
下のタブレットで「PROFILE」を確認できる。
タブで切り替えて「LUGGAGE」の持ち物も見てみよう。
Japanese.guide_3:
これがスキャンボタンだ、ワン！
「CAN」で外見、「X-RAY」で内部をチェックできる。
Japanese.guide_4:
派遣員なら質問も大事だ。
「ASK」ボタンで質問できる。
ただし、先にちゃんと調べてないと使えないからな、ワン！
Japanese.guide_5: 準備ができたら「DISPATCH」で最適な星へ送ろう。
Japanese.ending_result_template: 派遣結果：彼らを{0}回失望させ、{1}回満足させました！
